# MuleSoft Informatica Business 360 Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.0) of Informatica Business 360 Connector documentation.
> See [Informatica Business 360 Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Informatica Business 360 Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Informatica Business 360 Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/latest/index.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure Informatica Business 360 Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/latest/informatica-b360-connector-acb.md)
- [Informatica Business 360 Connector 1.0 Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/latest/informatica-b360-connector-examples.md)
- [Informatica Business 360 Connector 1.0 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/latest/informatica-b360-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Informatica Business 360 Connector 1.0](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/latest/informatica-b360-connector-studio.md)
- [Informatica Business 360 Connector 1.0 XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/informatica-b360-connector/latest/informatica-b360-connector-xml-maven.md)
